# Time Field

Use `TimeField` when users should enter a structured time value directly.

## When to Use

- Scheduling interfaces and availability inputs
- Time-bound settings or reminders

## Wraps

- `reka-ui` time-field primitive

## What Shadcn Adds

- Styled segmented input presentation that matches other field controls

## Installation

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn-vue@latest add time-field
```

## Example Patterns

- Vanilla: structured time entry
- Contextual: schedule form or time-range editor
